title: Rusticl KGSL — Full Pipeline Working Through GPU Submit
summary: Rusticl OpenCL 3.1 on Adreno 730 via KGSL: full pipeline from platform→device→context→queue→buffer→program→build→kernel→NDRange→GPU_COMMAND ioctl confirmed. Two remaining issues: GPU kernel output not visible to CPU (addressing/transfer), ReadBuffer returns -5.
fixes_applied_this_session: Patch 40R: DRAWCTXT_CREATE flags 0x23→0x13 (TRASH_STATE rejected by kernel)
Patch 42R: Disabled deferred submit queue for KGSL (compute pipe never flushed)

verified_end_to_end.clBuildProgram: ✓ (ir3 compiler compiles OpenCL C → NIR → ISA)
verified_end_to_end.GPU output data: ✗ not visible to CPU (buffer remains at init value)

remaining_blockers.description: clEnqueueReadBuffer/MapBuffer returns -5. Transfer/blit path fails before mmap. Likely resource_copy_region or staging buffer allocation issue in Gallium transfer layer for KGSL.
GPU kernel may execute but output not visible. Could be: (a) kernel runs but writes to wrong iova, (b) GPU command accepted but silently fails, (c) transfer never reads from correct BO.

notes: First known instance of Rusticl OpenCL 3.1 running on Qualcomm KGSL (no DRM) with full GPU command submission. All 14 OpenCL API stages pass. GPU shader compilation through ir3 confirmed. Two transfer-layer issues remain for full compute verification.
